headline: T. ROWE PRICE ADDS NEW EXCHANGE-TRADED FUND TO CAPITAL APPRECIATION SUITE
summary: T. Rowe Price, a global investment management firm and a leader in retirement, announced today the addition of the T. Rowe Price Capital Appreciation Market Opportunities ETF (Ticker: TPUT). TPUT is the third exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the firm's Capital Appreciation suite of funds. The fully transparent ETF began trading on the NYSE Arca today.

headline: Waymo launches premier subscription tier for $29.99 a month, starting in select cities
summary: Waymo is offering a new subscription tier for power users, starting in San Francisco, Los Angeles and Phoenix

headline: T. Rowe Price Tests Crypto ETF As Shares Trade Above Targets
summary: T. Rowe Price Group (NasdaqGS:TROW) is preparing to launch a crypto ETF that offers exposure to a curated basket of cryptocurrencies. The planned ETF will use active management and include token staking features for additional yield potential. This product marks a clear move by T. Rowe Price into digital asset management beyond its traditional retirement and mutual fund offerings. T. Rowe Price Group enters this new product phase with its stock at $106.43 and a mixed return profile. The...
